fire.title: Fire Energy
fire.desc: You burn bright. Passionate, impulsive, magnetic — you live fast and love hard. People either adore you or can't keep up.
fire.advice: Your fire inspires everyone around you. Just remember: not everything needs to be conquered. Sometimes the bravest thing is sitting still.
youProbably: Text back immediately or not for 3 days
Start 10 projects and finish 2 (but those 2 are legendary)
Give the best pep talks known to humanity
Fall in love with someone's energy before their name

earth.title: Earth Energy
earth.desc: You are the ground others stand on. Patient, loyal, and quietly powerful — you build empires while others chase trends.
earth.advice: Your steadiness is rare and beautiful. But let yourself be messy sometimes. Not everything needs to be planned to be meaningful.
youProbably: Have a skincare routine older than some friendships
Show love through actions, not words
Haven't changed your coffee order in 4 years

air.title: Air Energy
air.desc: You live in the world of ideas. Social, curious, and endlessly adaptable — your mind moves faster than most people can follow.
air.advice: Your intellect is your gift. But don't forget to land sometimes. The best connections happen when you stop analyzing and start feeling.
youProbably: Can argue any side of any debate
Get bored the moment something becomes predictable
Fall for someone's mind before anything else

water.title: Water Energy
water.desc: You feel everything. Intuitive, deep, and emotionally brave — you see what others miss and love in ways that change people.
water.advice: Your sensitivity is a superpower, not a weakness. Protect your energy, but don't build walls so high that love can't swim in.
youProbably: Cry at commercials and aren't even embarrassed
Know when someone's lying before they finish the sentence
Have a playlist for every emotional state
Love so deeply it sometimes scares you
